faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.subtitle: Can't find an answer? Use the lead form below and our team will follow up within one business day.

appointments_1.a: Yes. Every clinic gets a branded booking page where patients can pick a service, provider and time slot. Availability syncs automatically with each practitioner's personal calendar.

appointments_2.a: SANTÉ sends automated SMS and email reminders 24 hours and 1 hour before each visit. Reminder cadence and copy are fully customizable per service.

billing_1.a: Generate invoices in one click, charge saved cards, apply taxes and packages, and auto-send receipts. Stripe powers payment processing with full PCI-DSS compliance.

billing_2.q: Can I issue refunds or partial payments?
billing_2.a: Absolutely. Full refunds, partial refunds, deposits and installments are supported directly from the invoice screen — no need to leave SANTÉ.

clinical_1.q: What clinical note formats are supported?
clinical_1.a: Structured SOAP notes, follow-ups, couple and family notes, plus unlimited custom templates. An optional AI Scribe (English) transforms recorded sessions into ready-to-edit notes.

clinical_2.q: Can I import documents and intake forms?
clinical_2.a: Yes — upload PDFs and images directly to a patient file, and send digital intake or consent forms with auto-signature capture before the first visit.

security_1.q: Is SANTÉ compliant with privacy regulations?
security_1.a: SANTÉ is PIPEDA-compliant with healthcare-grade encryption at rest and in transit. Data is stored in Canada with daily backups and disaster recovery.

security_2.a: Role-based permissions restrict access to clinical staff with explicit grants. Every read and write is audit-logged for compliance reviews.

lead.title: Talk to a SANTÉ specialist.
lead.body: Tell us about your practice and a member of our team will walk you through the platform, answer questions and help you migrate.
lead.privacy: We'll only use your details to contact you about SANTÉ. No spam — promise.
lead.error: Something went wrong. Please check the form and try again.
lead.successBody: A specialist will reach out within one business day. Watch your inbox.
